---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear, concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the pain point or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this feature to work. Include details on expected behavior, UI changes, or API surface if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? If so, describe them here.

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, references, or links that help illustrate the request.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3
